name: All access to PII must be logged with actor, timestamp, and reason
description: Every read, write, or delete operation on data classified as PII must generate an audit log entry capturing: the acting principal, the precise timestamp (UTC ISO-8601), the resource accessed, and a stated reason. Access without audit logging is denied.

policy.rationale: PII access without an audit trail makes breach investigations impossible and violates most privacy regulations. The reason field enables proportionality review.
